title: Welcome to MCI Mail Service
body: Hi:  Welcome to MCI Communications' latest and greatest offering: 'MCI Mail Services'  We hope you'll look to us as fondly as you do your neighborhood postman!  Let us step into the future of communication together.  Best,  Vint Cerf  CEO of MCI Communications Corp.

title: Sales Notice
body: We are sorry to hear that you will be leaving our family of tenants, but hope wherever you're heading next is equally as great. We've found a prospective buyer already. So just ensure all of your belongings are moved out by the end of the week!

title: Collar
body: Your fuckup with the Giovanni would get most fledglings a final death from their Sire. You're fucking lucky I'm not an utter bastard whose beast is itching for some young blood on his fangs. You've prove a liability to be directly attached to my name and so I'm gonna move forward with letting you become officially independent soon. You're gonna have to prove yourself to me some more just so I know I don't have to leave you out for the sun, because even once I let you enjoy the title of neonate with those Camarilla fucks I still expect you to stick to me like glue kid.  You don't got anyone else in this city but your crew and I. Of those two I'm the only one who can save your ass from finding yourself wrapped in fourty layers of plastic wrap surrounded by 10 feet of concrete.   Delete after reading.

title: Let's Catch up
body: Hey man it's been like a month since we last hung. Jillian said you got cancer or some shit? What the fuck man?  Stop by the club and catch me up to speed on shit. Plus I even made a new friend in the city who you'd probably like, he's a big fucking history nerd too.

title: Status of Lost Delivery
body: We are sorry to inform you that we are closing your requested invetigation ticket concerning lost cargo.  We at Bayou Shipping Co. recommend informing your employer that your (and our) investigation into the matter has revealed Ralf Mullins had a severe drug addiction which led him down a path of desperation of selling the cargo to an unknown Cuban criminal group that has since gone deep underground.  Our company is happy to offer you a reward that shall be discreetly shipped to your warehouse in exchange for permanently alleviating your employer's mind of this minor cargo issue, alongside ensuring this email never reaches him and worries him more.  Sincerely,  Bayou Shipping Company

title: Domain Notice
body: Dear Fledglings:  The University of New Orleans is my domain. I will forgive your trangressions of stalking about my blood bank this once. If I catch you skulking my grounds with hunger in your eyes once more without permission my mercy will not be extended any longer.  Best,  Dean of New Orleans University  Lena Stamp

title: Heads Up
body: Brother make sure to stay away from Linsey and her little cohort of Brujah punks. They're nothing but trouble for you and I. Also, I'm talking up you and your coterie up to my Sire, so hopefully a future meeting can be arranged between you and him.  Stay Safe!

title: Questions about Exam 1
body: Looking to rise above being a nobody, then start working for and getting close to Vidal. Don't ever let him know your reasoning for it is this email. I'll contact you further from there.  'In History, stagnant waters, whether they be stagnant waters of custom or those of despotism, harbour no life; life is dependent on the ripples created by a few eccentric individuals. In homage to that life and vitality, the community has to brave certain perils and must countenance a measure of heresy. One must live dangerously if one wants to live at all.'  - Herbert Read

title: Идиот Чайльд
body: you have job. come jefferson park two nights  3:30am  job = neonate  BE THER тупая сука

title: Important Pickup Job
body: Mark:  Marcello has work that appeases your weird ass raccoon lifestyle. Got a high roller to pickup in your nicest car from NOIA at midnight on Friday. Make sure to dress nice too, the guy is flying in from Sicily if you catch my drift.  Best,  Torrenti

title: Obtain the Information
body: Morris,  Obtain any and all information on Benoit's operations as you can and deliver it to me. Ideally try to find and track a paper trail.  Make sure this is all done rather discreetly and done without his notice or that of his childe.  This information is valuable and I need not explain why. Get the job done at your earliest convenience. Also, don't worry I will ensure whatever is done with the information will not track back to either of us, so do not let the concept of this work later embarassing yourself infront of your new friends in unlife get the better of you. I have your back if you keep pace with your duties and will bring upon a final death for them if they lay a finger on you.

title: ALERT: Rail Lines in Willswood Under Maintenance
body: If you wanna be apart of change in the Big Easy then park on the Willswood rail tracks at 2:00am tomorrow night. Do not tell anyone outside your group about this, not even your 'parents'.  Can't give much details over this new fangled shit, but we stand against pricks like Mr. Gloves.

title: Interview Request
body: Hey Alley Cats I hear you're on the outs with the brother fuckers and not exactly a crew of rule book readers. I like that.  Come on down to the station for an 'interview' if that interests ya.  No twisting of your arm or nuffin', but we do got some pretty sweet jams here if thats you're kinda scene and entices ya.

title: The Wind
body: I’ve never been one for being afraid,  Or running away from a fight,  But I shiver with fear, whenever I hear  Things that go bump in the night.    You can call me a fool, if I hear a ghoul  Creaking its foot on the stair,  I’m outta that place, at double quick pace  You’re not going to keep me in there.    I know they’re not real, it’s just how I feel  We all have our crosses to bear,  At the first chilly breeze, I’m down on my knees  Reciting the words of a prayer.    If I saw a ghost, what would frighten me most  Would be if they noticed me too,  I’d probably faint, seeing something that ain’t;  Something you shouldn’t see through.    The worst thing I’ve seen, in life or on screen  Is a poltergeist turning her head,  I kept on the light, for many a night  And always checked under my bed.    You may laugh and scoff, if it’s spooky I’m off  At the first sign of something not right,  It’s true what I’ve said, I’m afraid of the dead  And things that go bump in the night....
